description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and a geometric, modular design, featuring large glass windows and multiple interconnected rectangular volumes. The structure is set on a broad platform with a wooden deck, landscaped with several trees and a swimming pool. The exterior combines dark and light gray panels with wooden accents, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The front facade is dominated by expansive glass walls, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor integration. The property includes a covered entryway, a rooftop terrace, and a spacious patio area. The overall layout is open and asymmetrical, with distinct zones for living, recreation, and relaxation.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, wooden decking, and a swimming pool, featuring a sleek, modular design and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main glass facade, entryway, and landscaped platform with trees and pool visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden deck, rooftop terrace, and the arrangement of trees around the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, patio area, and the back glass walls with additional greenery.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the modular structure, rooftop terrace, and the integration of outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped glass panels
